title: iIMPACT: Integrating Image and Molecular Profiles for Spatial Transcriptomics Analysis
author: Jiang, Xi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
iIMPACT is a novel method which integrates image and molecular profiles for spatial transcriptomics analysis. It is a multi-stage statistical method for histology-based spatial domain identification and domain-specific differentially expressed gene detection. 
 This package contains the iIMPACT software and processed datasets.
steps_raw:
iIMPACT is a novel method which integrates image and molecular profiles for spatial transcriptomics analysis. It is a multi-stage statistical method for histology-based spatial domain identification and domain-specific differentially expressed gene detection. 
 This package contains the iIMPACT software and processed datasets.
